forecasts.reasoning: We are tracking whether Discord will announce an IPO or file a public S-1 by July 1, 2025. The knowledge cutoff is May 23, 2025. Recent news from late March indicates that Discord hired Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan to explore a 2025 IPO. Typically, an S-1 drafting and confidential SEC review process takes 3 to 6 months after bankers are officially tapped. A public S-1 is usually not revealed until about 15 days before the actual IPO roadshow. Given the late March hiring of underwriters, a public filing before July 1 (equivalent to a 3-month turnaround) would be an exceptionally fast and compressed schedule. It is highly likely that Discord will target the traditional post-summer IPO window (September–November), pushing a formal announcement or public S-1 filing to August or later. Without any specific blog announcement (which companies generally avoid before filings due to "gun-jumping" regulations) and a tight timeline for a pre-July S-1, the probability of an announcement beforehand is low.
